# Single-node snapshot + log compaction.
# After committing entries, take a snapshot at the committed index and compact;
# firstIndex must advance past the compacted entries while lastIndex/committed
# stay put.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StateCandidate at term 1

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1

propose id=1 data=x
----
ok

propose id=1 data=y
----
ok

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=3

create-snapshot id=1 index=3
----
snapshot index=3 term=1

compact id=1 index=3
----
compacted to index=3

log-state id=1
----
id=1 firstIndex=4 lastIndex=3 committed=3 applied=3
